Notice Of Motion And Motion For Leave To File First Amended Cross-Complaint.
Off Calendar Apr-19-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance.

RULING: There being no appearance or objection, the Court adopts the tentative ruling on DEFENDANTS MICHAEL RABBITT, MARGARET MULLIGAN, H.J. RABBITT & SONS INC. AKA HENRY J. RABBITT & SONS INC.'S Motion For Leave To File First Amended Cross-Complaint as follows:

The Rabbit Defendants' motion for leave to file a first amended cross-complaint is GRANTED and all litigation as to the new claims are stayed pending the conclusion of the trial on the current claims. While California's liberal policy allowing amendments to pleadings favors permitting the Rabbit Defendants to file their proposed first amended cross-complaint, including those claims in a trial that is scheduled to start in a month and a half is prejudicial to the parties against whom the new claims are alleged unless the trial is continued and continuing the trial is prejudicial to the plaintiffs.

ORDER SIGNED. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: G. Gonzales; Not reported.
